item.title: Bottom shelf memes that are less than cool.
item.description:
@epicurusaquinas this one is for you.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
[Stolen from https://imgur.com/gallery/HqU2xWp ]
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Join to gaslight me!
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Good Bye. :)
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Quora: "Why do sharks leave blue whales alone? Couldn't they just bite off some parts from the slow, defenseless whale?"
item.description: Source: https://www.quora.com/Why-do-sharks-leave-blue-whales-alone-Couldnt-they-just-bite-off-some-parts-from-the-slow-defenseless-whale #whales #bluewhale #biology #shark #science #fight #bite #cool #nature #animals
item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: Some programming humor for a niche audience
item.description:
1. THIS
2
3
4. I wonder what people will think this photo is?
5
6
7
8
9. "How can you be on you computer all day?" Me: "Like this!"
10
11. Any suggestions?!
12. Do you know any coder that actually dresses okay?
13. If I install Half-Life 1 but 3 times, will we finally get to play Half-Life 3?
14. And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard ( on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal. The demo is out now and it made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features some wacky humor, kind of like this dump. If you want to check it out here is the link: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, have a happy Sunday and may our code always compile!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Don't Ever Forget
item.description: "For your consideration..." - Rod Serling FP Edit::: I can't believe I have to say this --- but this post and Remembrance Day is about the WW2 atrocity and learning from it. I do not support hate towards any humans. And we are all human. Note: My typical "Cheers!" at the end of post text has been removed after one Imgurian's astute observation that it was inappropriate (they were very correct - and I didn't think first).
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Lego Shark
item.description: Credit : Jason Alleman
item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: Wholesome af
item.description: A person I formerly rented from asked me for my current address recently. This person rented me a space in their house that was the first place I had to actually call home when I had to leave my house after I got divorced. I paid a completely fair amount of money for my accommodations and really enjoyed my time there, and like all rental situations, I figured that was that. Yesterday I got this in the mail. It's a letter from that person, informing me that they sold their house and that they were paying me and every tenant they ever had for what we contributed to the profit they made from selling the house. I have been sitting with this for more than a day and I am still completely beyond an actual way to describe what this act means to me. All that I can say is that there are people who talk about their values and there are people who actually live them, and the reason I wanted to share this is that I want to encourage us all to actually live our values. Do it off the clock, do it when no one is watching, do it always. (This is shared anonymized to the person that did it, but with their permission. They agreed that if this could inspire others to take kind actions, it was worth sharing) by Chris Robarge Found through wholesome page on fb. I am not op
item.dc:creator: Humangiver

item.title: Help Trader Joe's workers fight union busting
item.description: Get ready to boycott Trader Joe's! (But don't do it just yet.) Trader Joe’s management has continued its intense union-busting tactics at every store that has filed for a union election. The company refuses to bargain in good faith with its workers. Trader Joe’s crew members at stores across the country are unionizing to fight for the pay, benefits, and safe working conditions that match Trader Joe’s progressive image. The union is now asking customers to sign up for a future boycott, and to continue shopping as normal until the boycott is called by the union. If everyone boycotts at the same time the impact will be maximized. Sign up to the Trader Joe's United Customer List to show your solidarity with workers, and be ready to boycott when the union sends out the call to action! https://actionnetwork.org/forms/stand-with-trader-joes-united-sign-on-in-solidarity/
item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: A park near my house just added these anti homeless pieces of wood to all the benches.
item.description: They are only held in place by a few hex bolts on the back and underneath, I'm thinking of going by with a drill some time and removing them. Or at least removing the bolts so the stupid piece of wood can be moved if someone wants to. FP edit: That's my hammock in the background, I like to set it up at the park when it's nice and read or listen to music. No I'm not going to leave it there for a homeless person, it would just get taken down by the park as trash and thrown away. I really like the idea of removing the 2 bottom bolts and one of the back bolts so it just swivels if someone wants to lay down. I'm going to try next week to do that, I'll look for cameras, if someone stops me I'll play dumb and say some asshole must have put them in the benches defacing them so people can't sit and I'm removing them since the city would never put trash in the benches like this or some bs. Then act surprised and horrified when they admit they put it there to make homeless people sleep on the floor. Thank you for the input
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.dc:creator: TeslaSupreme

item.title: Painting with notes
item.description: 1725: it’s been a long day at the workshop. The air is hot in Venice and you decide to go to your favorite gelato at the grand palazzo. There’s a crowd gathered and abuzz with excitement. The musicians on stage start playing and you hear this music for the first time in your life. Vivaldi’s Four Seasons. The mundane worries of your daily life melt away. You have the time of your life as you realize how much power music has to transform the soul. Now where’s that gelato ??
item.dc:creator: maureoko

item.title: Kiya Was Here
item.description: I thank you all for the kind words and I'm glad her life can be remembered on such a scale as this. I'm sorry for making some of you cry. I hope none of this comes off like I'm seeking out pity or attention. My only intention is to share her story with anyone who may enjoy knowing she was in this world and made it better.
item.dc:creator: juggernaut1
